DecisionCardMeta.description: Cross-gate context surfaced to the operator with every DecisionCard.

cache_state.description: Current prompt-cache warmth estimate for the trial.
cache_state.title: Cache State

affected_nodes.description: Manifest node ids affected by current overrides or cache churn.
affected_nodes.title: Affected Nodes

override_trail.description: Append-only override history already applied to this trial.
override_trail.title: Override Trail

party_mode_contributions.description: Optional multi-persona contributions consolidated into this card.
party_mode_contributions.title: Party Mode Contributions

consolidated_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp when party-mode contributions were consolidated.
consolidated_at.title: Consolidated At

DecisionCardMeta.title: DecisionCardMeta

OverrideEvent.description: One operator-approved override that affects cache warmth and routing context.

event_id.description: UUID4 identity for this override event.
event_id.title: Event Id

applied_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp for when the override applied.
applied_at.title: Applied At

node_id.description: Manifest node id that the override touches.
node_id.title: Node Id

previous_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the previous setting.
previous_value.title: Previous Value

new_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the new setting.
new_value.title: New Value

operator_id.description: Operator identity that confirmed the override.
operator_id.title: Operator Id

confirm_token.description: Confirmation token bound to the override submission surface.
confirm_token.title: Confirm Token

OverrideEvent.title: OverrideEvent

PartyModeContribution.description: One persona's contribution to a consolidated party-mode review.

persona.description: Persona or reviewer identity that produced the contribution.
persona.title: Persona

trace_link.description: LangSmith trace URL or repo-relative trace export path.
trace_link.title: Trace Link

PartyModeContribution.title: PartyModeContribution

card_id.description: UUID4 identity for this DecisionCard instance.
card_id.title: Card Id

trial_id.description: UUID4 identity for the enclosing trial run.
trial_id.title: Trial Id

gate_id.description: Closed gate identifier for the subclass discriminator.
gate_id.title: Gate Id

created_at.description: Timezone-aware creation timestamp for the emitted DecisionCard.
created_at.title: Created At

drafted_proposal.description: Marcus-authored proposed action the operator is reviewing.
drafted_proposal.title: Drafted Proposal

evidence.description: Machine-readable supporting evidence snippets for the proposal.
evidence.title: Evidence

risks.description: Plain-language risk bullets surfaced to the operator.
risks.title: Risks

verb.description: Closed decision verb set: approve | edit | reject.
verb.title: Verb

meta.description: Cross-gate cache and override context per architecture D2.
